scripts.hearth: scripts/convert-webp.sh && node scripts/build-of-calendar.mjs && python3 scripts/build-corpus.py _site/hearth/v2 && serve _site/hearth/v2 -p 4100 --cors
scripts.build:preview: pnpm --filter @ember/app exec eas build --profile preview --platform ios
scripts.build:production: pnpm --filter @ember/app exec eas build --profile production --platform ios --auto-submit
scripts.build:production:local: GIT_CLONE_PROTECTION_ACTIVE=false pnpm --filter @ember/app exec eas build --profile production --platform ios --local
scripts.build:apk:cloud: GIT_CLONE_PROTECTION_ACTIVE=false pnpm --filter @ember/app exec eas build --platform android --profile preview
scripts.submit:ios: pnpm --filter @ember/app exec pnpm eas submit --platform ios
